briefdescription.para: This function sets pointers to the HDCP 2.2 keys.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize the HDCP repeater instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp_Repeater instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enforces downstream content blocking based on the upstream encryption status and stream type information.

detaileddescription.para: When the content is required to be blocked, cipher output blanking is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp_Repeater instance.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if blocking enforced successfully.
XST_FAILURE if blocking could not be enforced.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the downstream interface transitions from an authenticated state to an unauthenticated state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp_Repeater instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the downstream interface transitions to the authenticated state.

detaileddescription.para: Encryption will be enabled for a downstream interface based on the downstream interface protocol and content stream type setting.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp22_Repeater instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets pointers to the HDCP 2.2 keys.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to bind an HDMI transmitter instance as a repeater downstream interface.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called for each downstream interface in a repeater topology. The maximum downstream interfaced is indicated by XHDCP_MAX_DOWNSTREAM_INTERFACES.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp_Repeater instance.
is a pointer to the HDMI receiver instance.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if downstream interface registered successfully.
XST_FAILURE if downstream interface could not be registered.
